name: keepseek-context-reference-maintainer
description: KeepSeek file, directory, drag-drop, authorization, prompt reference, and opener maintenance workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin for prompt file and directory references, Explorer and editor context insertion, drag-and-drop references, external authorization, reference expansion, and reference opening behavior.
defaultPrompt: Use $keepseek-context-reference-maintainer to fix this reference bug.
